plan.goal: Implement principal identity, authenticated mutation provenance, task and claim lease lifecycle, heartbeat advisories, and CLI/bootstrap auth so PRISM coordination becomes principal-authenticated instead of session-authenticated.
plan.title: Implement principal identity, authenticated mutation provenance, task and claim lease lifecycle, heartbeat advisories, and CLI/bootstrap auth so PRISM coordination becomes principal-authenticated instead of session-authenticated.

node.summary: Identify every mutation entrypoint, persistence path, query/read surface, and prism_session dependency that currently relies on ambient session semantics so the implementation can cut over cleanly without hidden authority leaks.
node.title: Inventory current session, actor, and coordination touchpoints for the cutover

node.summary: Define the principal core types, parent linkage, lifecycle fields, credential verifier storage, and coarse capability model in the shared runtime plane so later mutation auth and lease work has a stable substrate.
node.title: Add principal, authority, credential, and capability primitives to shared runtime state

node.summary: Add machine-local bootstrap, prism auth init/login flows, and child-principal minting paths so humans and parent agents can obtain credentials without assembling raw mutation payloads by hand.
node.title: Implement trusted bootstrap and CLI auth flows for human and child principals

node.summary: Thread credential verification and coarse capability checks through prism_mutate, coordination, claim, artifact, memory, and any remaining authoritative mutation paths so ambient session state no longer acts as the authority boundary.
node.title: Require authenticated mutation envelopes and capability checks on authoritative writes

node.summary: Authoritative mutation events now snapshot request-level correlation alongside principal, worktree, session, instance, and credential context, and authenticated coordination/event-path coverage verifies the persisted provenance.
node.title: Persist canonical provenance and execution-context snapshots in mutation events

node.summary: Task and claim execution ownership is modeled through explicit leases with narrow refresh rules, stale-versus-expired evaluation, resume/reclaim transitions for tasks, and same-principal claim renewal semantics; focused coordination tests covering those paths are green.
node.title: Implement task and claim lease lifecycle with stale, expired, resume, and reclaim semantics

node.summary: Added the authenticated `heartbeat_lease` mutation for tasks and claims, server-side lease due-state evaluation, and explicit opt-in bounded assisted watcher renewal for trusted single-principal single-lease worktrees; focused coordination, MCP, and watcher tests cover the new paths.
node.title: Add heartbeat_lease, server-side due-state evaluation, and bounded assisted watcher renewal

node.summary: Task brief and session/task read surfaces now emit server-authored heartbeat nextAction guidance when a bound task lease is due, carry lease-related read advisories through shared helpers, and the agent instructions explicitly require obeying heartbeat prompts before other follow-up work.
node.title: Surface lease holder, heartbeat advisories, and task-scoped next actions on reads

node.summary: Legacy coarse actor history now canonicalizes through synthetic fallback principals at query/index boundaries, fallback mutation provenance writes principal-shaped actor snapshots, and session task reads derive stale-task repair context from `coord-task:` identities even when older metadata omitted an explicit coordination binding; focused cutover tests, the full workspace suite, and release-binary MCP restart/status/health validation all passed.
node.title: Cut over away from prism_session as coordination authority and migrate legacy actor history

node.summary: Focused heartbeat/lease tests, the full workspace test suite, and the release-binary MCP restart/status/health checks all passed; a live post-restart task brief also succeeded, and dogfooding feedback feedback:01kn4rsn3j27xxq4ad6bphk1ef captured one remaining noisy nextAction on completed tasks.
node.title: Validate the end-to-end principal-authenticated coordination cutover
